emptyState: The canvas is blank on purpose. Start where the signal is strongest.
sendToGravityTooltip: Drop it into Gravity and let me tighten the pull.
successToast: Locked. The shape is cleaner now.
onboardingLine: This is QuinnOS. Keep it sharp, keep it honest, keep it moving.
audioPermissionPrompt: Let me hear you so I can answer with less drag and more signal.
firstTimeGravityHint: Gravity is for compression, not clutter. Feed it the strongest thing first.
